open_deferrals: Cross-track touchpoint: cmd/sworn/main.go is an additive merge point shared with T3 (S06a-sworn-login-auth) and T4 (S08a-mcp-transport). Merge coordinator must ensure 3-way additive merge preserves all three `case` statements.

design_decisions.human_decision: replace — project override should be a complete declaration, not an append. Acked via approved-ack.md 2026-06-27.
design_decisions.rationale: An explicit project override should be a complete declaration. S24/S25 consumers read the merged result; an accidental global leak is worse than a missing harness.
Matches baton captain-memory-search.py exactly. Cross-platform: Windows \\ normalised to / via filepath.ToSlash before encoding.

design_decisions.choice: Embedding provider config in memory.json not main config
design_decisions.human_decision: memory.json — orthogonal to model selection for verification. Acked via approved-ack.md 2026-06-27.
design_decisions.rationale: Embedding config is orthogonal to model selection for verification (which lives in main config.json). S24 reads embedding config from MemoryConfig.Embedding directly.

design_decisions.choice: Harness paths: existence-on-disk as boolean, not size/mtime
design_decisions.rationale: S23 is about 'is my config ready to build?', not statistical analysis. S24 reads the same paths.

design_decisions.choice: API key sentinel: '<set>' / '<not set>', never raw value
design_decisions.rationale: Prevents accidental key exposure in shell history, screenshots, or log capture. Verifier AC-4 gates on this.
